hero.headline: Guiding families home with integrity and clarity
hero.subheadline: A family-centered, bilingual real estate team helping you build stability, security, and a place your family can truly call home.
hero.portraitAlt: The A&J Real Estate Group team

whoWeAre.title: Where experience, service, and fresh energy unite for your success
whoWeAre.intro: We are A&J Real Estate — a family-centered, service-driven team committed to guiding you home with integrity and clarity. We combine market knowledge, strategy, and genuine care to help you build stability, security, and a place your family can truly call home.

members.adriana: Trusted Virginia/North Carolina expert and mother of three, rooting our team in service and long-term relationships.
members.john: Active duty Navy serviceman who delivers discipline and strategic precision.
members.viviane: Civil engineer and multicultural mom offering analytical expertise and trilingual service across Hampton Roads.
members.melany: Bilingual new mom who brings fresh energy and a deep understanding of growing families.

testimonials.title: Families who found their home with us

salesStories.title: Thousands of smiles, one home at a time
salesStories.intro: Throughout my career I've been fortunate to see thousands of smiles and hugs. That's why I became a real estate agent — because I know the joy of a family opening the doors to their dream home.

contactCta.title: Ready to find your dream home?
contactCta.subtitle: Let's find it together. Reach out — we're always happy to talk with you.

newsletter.title: Stay Ahead in Real Estate Trends!
newsletter.subtitle: Be the first to get exclusive real estate insights, market updates, and expert tips.
newsletter.offer: Sign up and receive our free guide: 10 Secrets to Maximizing Your Property Value.
